title: Tadehagi alatum
taxonomy: Tadehagi alatum is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, specifically belonging to the subfamily Faboideae. It is classified under the genus Tadehagi, which is a group of annual or perennial plants native to various parts of the world. The genus Tadehagi is further grouped under the tribe Astragaleae, which comprises plants with similar characteristics. The exact classification of Tadehagi alatum can be broken down as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Fabales, Family: Fabaceae, Subfamily: Faboideae, Tribe: Astragaleae, Genus: Tadehagi, Species: T. alatum. This plant's classification is part of its identification and understanding within the botanical community.
